page_context:
## Page: Employee Satisfaction Survey

### Interactive Elements (5 total)

| ui-id | Tag | Type | Text/Label | Position | Disabled |
|-------|-----|------|------------|----------|----------|
| `ui-id-0` | input | radio | Very Satisfied | (200, 150) |  |
| `ui-id-1` | input | radio | Satisfied | (200, 190) |  |
| `ui-id-2` | input | radio | Neutral | (200, 230) |  |
| `ui-id-3` | input | radio | Dissatisfied | (200, 270) |  |
| `ui-id-4` | button | submit | Next Page | (400, 500) |  |

### Page Text Content
Q1. How satisfied are you with your current work environment?

expected_output.thought: A single-choice question: 'How satisfied are you with your current work environment?' with 4 options. Per the requirements, select 'Satisfied' (ui-id-1), then click Next.

actions.reason: Question complete, go to next page

page_context:

| `ui-id-2` | input | tel | Please enter your phone | (200, 220) |  |
| `ui-id-3` | button | submit | Submit Survey | (400, 500) |  |

### Page Text Content

expected_output.thought: Three required text input fields. Fill in name, email, and phone per the requirements. Submit after all fields are complete.

actions.reason: All required fields complete, submit survey

page_context:
## Page: Product Satisfaction Matrix

### Interactive Elements (12 total)

| ui-id | Tag | Type | Text/Label | Position | Disabled |
|-------|-----|------|------------|----------|----------|
| `ui-id-0` | input | radio | Strongly Agree-Product Quality | (300, 100) |  |
| `ui-id-1` | input | radio | Agree-Product Quality | (380, 100) |  |
| `ui-id-2` | input | radio | Neutral-Product Quality | (460, 100) |  |
| `ui-id-3` | input | radio | Disagree-Product Quality | (540, 100) |  |
| `ui-id-4` | input | radio | Strongly Agree-Customer Service | (300, 150) |  |
| `ui-id-5` | input | radio | Agree-Customer Service | (380, 150) |  |
| `ui-id-6` | input | radio | Neutral-Customer Service | (460, 150) |  |
| `ui-id-7` | input | radio | Disagree-Customer Service | (540, 150) |  |
| `ui-id-8` | button | submit | Next Page | (400, 600) |  |

### Page Text Content
Matrix: Please rate the following aspects
|  | Strongly Agree | Agree | Neutral | Disagree |
| Product Quality | ○ | ○ | ○ | ○ |
| Customer Service | ○ | ○ | ○ | ○ |

expected_output.thought: A 2-row matrix/Likert scale. Row 1 is 'Product Quality', row 2 is 'Customer Service', each with 4 levels. Per requirements, select the 'Agree' column for all rows. 'Agree' corresponds to the 2nd radio button in each row.

actions.reason: Matrix complete, go to next page
